prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 12 名（2021 年第 11→2022 年第 13→2023 年第 13→2024 年第 16→2025 年第 14→2026 年第 12），近年稳居全国前 15，C9 联盟成员、国防七子之一；2026 年声誉评价中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理类舆情，无重大负面事件；抖音热度高热（总排名第 10，综合热度 453 万），国防七子标签持续吸引关注；2024 年曾出现投档线异常信号（考生反映投档线暴跌），但 2025 年位次已大幅回升，报考心理趋于稳定；第五轮学科评估 A- 及以上 17 个：机械工程 A+、材料科学与工程 A+、环境科学与工程 A+、力学 A+、控制科学与工程 A、计算机科学与技术 A、软件工程 A、土木工程 A、仪器科学与技术 A、数学 A、电气工程 A、管理科学与工程 A、信息与通信工程 A-、光学工程 A-、动力工程及工程热物理 A-、建筑学 A-、航空宇航科学与技术 A-；工科实力顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等哈工大核心工科专业社会热度持续高热（2024 年电子信息/通信 ，电气工程 74.28），报考竞争激烈；本省 2026 年考生总数 167000 人，按近年物理类占比约 68% 估算约 113894 人，较 2025 年物理类 117407 人减少约 3%，竞争略有缓和；哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，为本省唯一 C9 高校，本地招生占比显著（2025 年本省物理类计划 487 人，占全国总计划一定比例），本省考生报考意愿强烈，地域偏好正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 1155 名、2026 年计划小幅扩招 2.9%、本省物理类考生减少约 3% 以及学校声誉稳定、工科专业热度持续高涨等因素，供需两端基本平衡；预测最低位次约1175名，区间1041–1309名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3689→4276→3535→2570→1155. Starting in 2024, due to the split of major groups under the new Gaokao system, the school's cutoff ranking significantly advanced (2570 in 2024, 1155 in 2025), with a cumulative advance of about 2415 positions over the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1155. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan decreased year by year: 728 in 2021→713 in 2022→568 in 2023→553 in 2024→487 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 501, a slight increase of about 2.9% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking 2026 approximately 12th (2021: 11th→2022: 13th→2023: 13th→2024: 16th→2025: 14th→2026: 12th), consistently among the top 15 nationally. Member of the C9 League, one of the Seven Sons of National Defense. In 2026, reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management public opinion, with no major negative incidents. High popularity on Douyin (total ranking 10th, comprehensive popularity 4.53 million), with the 'Seven Sons of National Defense' label continuing to attract attention. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff (candidates reported a sharp drop), but the ranking in 2025 has significantly rebounded, stabilizing the application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 17 disciplines were rated A- or above: Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Mechanics A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, Civil Engineering A, Instrument Science and Technology A, Mathematics A, Electrical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Optical Engineering A-, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A-, Architecture A-, Aerospace Science and Technology A-. The engineering strength is top-notch, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors at HIT, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, continue to have high social popularity (in 2024, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering 74.28), leading to intense competition for applications. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is 167,000, with an estimated 113,894 in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 68%, a decrease of about 3% compared to 117,407 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, and is the only C9 university in the province, with a significant local enrollment share (in 2025, the provincial Physics Category plan was 487, accounting for a certain proportion of the national total). Local candidates have a strong willingness to apply, with a positive regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1155, a slight 2.9% expansion in the 2026 plan, a reduction of about 3% in provincial Physics Category candidates, stable school reputation, and sustained high popularity of engineering majors, supply and demand are basically balanced. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1175, with a range of 1041–1309.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1041), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship classes.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 901→933→893→684→771. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking moved forward to 684, and in 2025 it slightly moved back to 771; the fluctuation over the past two years is about 87 places, with a baseline of approximately 771 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 54 in 2021 → 55 in 2022 → 67 in 2023 → 40 in 2024 → 71 in 2025, showing significant fluctuation. The 2026 plan is 42 students, a sharp reduction of about 40.8% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 12th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, member of the C9 League. Although known for engineering, the 985 level still has strong appeal for liberal arts candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative incidents. High popularity on Douyin (total ranking 10th), the label of 'National Defense Seven Sons' boosts overall attention. No obvious record of admission gaps. Although primarily engineering-focused, disciplines such as Management Science and Engineering (A) and Architecture (A-) are directly related to liberal arts enrollment majors (Economics and Management Experimental Class, Architecture), and the strength of these disciplines supports the popularity of related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of economics and management is divided and cautious (2024), architecture is divided and cautious (58.72), overall popularity is stable. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is 167,000, with an estimated 53,106 in the history category based on a recent proportion of about 32%, a decrease of about 3% from 54,707 in 2025, slightly easing competition, but far from offsetting the 40.8% enrollment reduction. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in the province and is the only C9-level university available to liberal arts candidates in the province, leading to strong willingness to apply. In 2025, the history category only had one major group (Economics and Management Experimental Class), with a narrow range of major choices, which may suppress some candidates' applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 771, the sharp 40.8% reduction in the 2026 plan, a decrease of about 3% in provincial history category candidates, and stable school reputation, the enrollment reduction significantly intensifies competition, and the ranking will clearly move forward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 582, with a range of 516–648.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The school only offers one enrollment major in the history category in Heilongjiang Province: Economics and Management Experimental Class (Intelligent Social Governance). Rankings within the predicted range of 516–648 have a chance of admission. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<516) have a high probability of admission, while rankings near the upper limit (>648) require caution. It is recommended to also consider history category enrollment majors at other 985 universities as alternatives.
